lead_profile_text: 4 double bedrooms plus potential 5th via study conversion. Completely unfurnished — husband Steven (builder) completing new flooring. Nice cul-de-sac, parking for 6+ cars, 10 minutes from Blackpool Victoria Hospital, adjacent to Ribby Hall Holiday Village (5-star resort). Rona and Steven live 12 minutes from the property and will handle maintenance themselves.
emotional_profile: Certainty-seeker. Primary concern is reliable month-to-month income, not just peak figures. Two-person decision with Steven. Comparing Stayful against other service providers before deciding.
delay_trigger_phrases: reviewing with other service providers alongside Stayful before making a decision
green_light_trigger_phrases: Ribby Hall overflow demand — proximity to 5-star resort as direct demand driver
parking for 6+ cars as a significant competitive advantage

top_objections.text: Quiet months could challenge profitability vs £2,500 long-term rental equivalent
top_objections.zac_response: Annual comparison shown: £29,497 STL net vs ~£13,764 LTL net. Even worst month (£1,526 March) beats properly-costed LTL net.

top_objections.text: Property is completely unfurnished — setup cost and process are a key consideration before committing
top_objections.zac_response: Steven (builder husband) completing new flooring — minimal practical barrier once done. Stayful handles photography and setup checklist.

top_objections.text: Reviewing with other service providers alongside Stayful before making a decision
top_objections.zac_response: 13%+VAT special offer expires 30 June — creates concrete decision deadline.

top_questions.text: Is the income reliable month-to-month, not just at peak?
top_questions.answer: Annual comparison presented: even worst month (£1,526 net) beats properly-costed LTL net. £29,497 vs ~£13,764 annually.

top_questions.text: What would converting the study to a 5th bedroom add?
top_questions.answer: Increases capacity to 8–10 guests and boosts revenue approximately 10%.

what_moved_them: Ribby Hall overflow demand — proximity to 5-star resort as direct demand driver
Parking for 6+ cars as significant competitive advantage in the Fylde market
Large entertaining space and pet-friendly potential with laminate flooring
£274 nightly rate and Blackpool Victoria Hospital demand driver
6-month initial term structure (fixed, then rolling 3-month notice)
what_fell_flat: £1,526 quiet-month floor vs Rona's £2,500/month LTL reference created concern

conversion_gaps.gap: Steven (key decision-maker) not present on call — reviewing separately
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Action plan addresses income security framing directly for Steven's review. Ensure it covers practical setup feasibility (flooring, furnishing timeline).
Follow up before 30 June with income security narrative; lead with annual comparison rather than peak figures.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (from 15%), expires 30 June 2026. Led with income security (annual stack) rather than peak month ceiling. Ribby Hall proximity as unique demand driver.
zac_close_phrase: Decision needed before 30 June 2026 to retain the discounted rate
zac_income_intro: Average net £2,450/month, low season (March) £1,500 net, peak season (August) £3,900 net, based on £274 ADR and 56% occupancy. Expect 15% less in first year while building reviews.
zac_transition_phrases: Converting the study to a 5th bedroom would increase capacity and boost revenue approximately 10%
zac_reassurance_phrases: Even the worst month (£1,526 net) beats a properly-costed long-term let net
